symptoms.symptom_name: Chest trauma with rapidly worsening severe respiratory distress

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Reflects severe gas exchange failure from lung collapse.
Reflects critical hemodynamic compromise from mediastinal shift.

symptoms.symptom_name: Absent breath sounds, hyperresonance, distended neck veins, tracheal deviation, hypotension

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Clinician-only findings sealed from telehealth chat.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Chest trauma with progressive cyanosis and altered consciousness confirms an unmanageable-by-phone thoracic emergency.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Immediate 000/HEMS dispatch for needle decompression and trauma care
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Time-critical; obstructive shock progresses to cardiac arrest within minutes without decompression.
Confirms extent of injury but should not delay emergency transport.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Advising the neighbor to attempt any chest intervention themselves
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Requires trained clinical/paramedic intervention; attempting this without training risks harm.
